Entries.Text: Skip Havok Collision / Navmesh Loading
If enabled, the havok collisions and navmeshes will not be loaded.
Enable Load on Double-click
If enabled, double-clicking a map in the map list will load it.
Display Map Aliases
If enabled, the map aliases for maps will be displayed.
Display Character Aliases
If enabled, character aliases will be displayed where possible.
Display Asset Aliases
If enabled, asset (object) aliases will be displayed where possible.
Display Map Piece Aliases
If enabled, map piece aliases will be displayed where possible.
Display Treasure Aliases
If enabled, itemlot references will be displayed as aliases for treasure events.
Enable Community Names
If enabled, community names are used for each map object property name.
Display Unknown Properties
If enabled, unknown properties will be displayed (i.e. any property starting with Unk).
Propagate Name Changes to References
If enabled, renaming a viewport object will propagate the name change to any references it is found in.
Display Property Attributes
If enabled, data type attributes are displayed in the tooltip for each property.
Display at the Top
If enabled, the additional property information will be displayed at the top of the properties window. By default they will appear at the bottom.
Display Map Object Behavior Information
If enabled, information about what the map object does is displayed.
Display Map Object References
If enabled, references information for the map object is displayed.
Display Reference Name
If enabled, map object references will display the name of the map object.
Display Reference Entity ID
If enabled, map object references will display the Entity ID of the map object.
Display Reference Alias
If enabled, map object references will display the alias of the map object.
Enable Substitution
If enabled, the character marker for 'c0000' map objects will be substituted for the character model assigned here.
Character Model ID
The character ID of the model you want to use for the substitution.
Display Aliases
If enabled, aliases for each model entry are displayed where possible.
Display Tags
If enabled, the tags associated with an model are displayed.
Include Low Detail Entries
If enabled, the low detail part entries are displayed.
Enable Shortcuts for Groups
If enabled, the shortcuts for Selection Groups are enabled.
Frame Selection on Use
If enabled, when a selection group is triggered, the contents is framed in the viewport.
Enable Quick Creation
If enabled, the 'Create Selection Group' shortcut will automatically create the group, bypassing the creation prompt.
Confirm before Deletion
If enabled, a confirmation dialog occurs before deletion of a group.
Display Shortcut
If enabled, the shortcut to select a group is displayed next to its name.
Display Tags
If enabled, the tags associated with a group are displayed next to its name.
